# CWE-1265 safe: lock scope avoids nested acquisition
lang: go
file: CWE-1265-safe.go
---
package sample

// CWE-1265 mitigated: helper performs SQL update; handler holds lock only once per path.

import (
	"net/http"
	"sync"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

var ledgerMuSafe sync.Mutex

func applyBalanceDelta(db *sqlx.DB, userID int, delta float64) error {
	_, err := db.Exec("UPDATE balances SET amount = amount + $1 WHERE user_id = $2", delta, userID)
	return err
}

func PostTransferSafe(db *sqlx.DB) gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		from := c.GetInt("from_user")
		to := c.GetInt("to_user")
		amount := c.GetFloat64("amount")
		ledgerMuSafe.Lock()
		defer ledgerMuSafe.Unlock()
		if err := applyBalanceDelta(db, from, -amount); err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		if err := applyBalanceDelta(db, to, amount); err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"ok": true})
	}
}
